message:
Implement from_mysql operator with async I/O

Implement the MySQL source operator as a single-file async implementation
using folly::coro::Transport and AsyncGenerator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,4 +5,3 @@ from_mysql show="tables",
            user=env("MYSQL_USER"),
            password=env("MYSQL_PASSWORD"),
            database=env("MYSQL_DATABASE")
-sort table

@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
 suite: from-mysql
 fixtures: [mysql]
 timeout: 180
-skip: "from_mysql operator not yet implemented"
